title: 3D_Rectangle: per-pixel Z-buffer composite of masked clone quads over B
goal: Build a per-pixel Z-BUFFERED composite for the 3D_Rectangle clone box (the ONLY correct path; painter/layer-Z order is the ⛔ measured dead-end, net -1.19, see ROADMAP 3D_RECTANGLE dead-end). DECODED FACTS (T-qrect3d0001): drawn base = Transition B (id 10006, enabled, bottom of tree); Transition A (id 10009) is <enabled>0</enabled> and only exists as a clone source. 27 clone nodes form a NESTED chain: Inside 01 (Shape id 10054, filled rect +-960x+-540, scale 0.91) is re-cloned Inside 02..08; each Shape 0N (clone src=TransA, mask=Inside 0(N-1), Mask Blend Mode=1) is re-cloned by Clone Layer/1..8. Two Rig Behaviors on Inside 01 drive Scale (./1/100/105) and Position (./1/100/101) via 7 Snapshot columns (anisotropic scale: X 0.26..1.18, Y 0.82..0.89 -> the rectangle spiral), pushed to animated world-Z through the Camera. STEP 1 the clone-source Image-Mask BAKE is already proven correct in isolation (f00 18.59->37.87) and MUST be reused. Measured engine failure: B-ness (Blue-Red) stays pinned ~-81 all frames while GT rises -48->+13 -> Transition B never enters the composite; masked full-frame A quads occlude B in painter order. DoD: engine renders the concentric thin-B-seam spiral matching GT f1-f8, and fct regress engine is net-positive (target slug 16.48->materially up).
